description: Verify tool.ts (Lane 0a) and session/tools.ts (Lane 0d) changes integrate cleanly
verification_steps: Read tool.ts — verify Tool.Def extended with timeout, retry, errorTaxonomy, maxConcurrency
Read session/tools.ts — verify semaphore split (read=10, write=3), per-tool timeout override, enriched spans
Verify tool.ts's new wrap() changes are compatible with session/tools.ts bridge pattern
Verify no duplicate Effect.withSpan nesting occurs (wrap() + bridge both add spans)
Run: cd packages/opencode && bun run typecheck
If conflicts: create produce_fragment for each file with conflict resolution
